docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-05-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-20-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

NOTICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES ; AFFIRMATION FILED BY PETITIONER HAMBRECHT & QUIST CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR AUG-05-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER HAMBRECHT & QUIST CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT CALLIGAR, KEN $42,798.84 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $42,798.84, SEE SCANNED DOC
PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER HAMBRECHT & QUIST CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT CALLIGAR, KEN

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER HAMBRECHT & QUIST CALIFORNIA'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON IS GRANTED. THE PETITIONER PROVIDED A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE AT THE HEARING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER HAMBRECHT & QUIST'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 20, 2011 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 301 PER MOVING PARTY. PETITIONER TO PROVIDE DEPARTMENT 301 WITH COURTESY COPIES OF THE PETITION, NOTICE OF HEARING, PROOF OF SERVICE AND ALL OTHER SUPPORTING PAPERS PER LOCAL RULE 2.6(B) BY AUGUST 8, 2011. COURTESY COPIES TO REFLECT NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR #8189
EREQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PETITIONER FILED BY PETITIONER HAMBRECHT & QUIST CALIFORNIA
